name: Introduction to the Graduate Recruitment Process
description: This module introduces students to the graduate recruitment process by providing them with the skills required to secure a work placement or summer internship. It also provides the opportunity to acquire, develop and apply these skills by participating in a variety of different tasks linked to the recruitment process.
